theme.en: Capacity Pressure Reprices the Chip Stack
theme.zh: 产能压力重估芯片供应链

dek.en: Advanced-node constraints are pushing prospective customers toward alternative foundries, while HBM demand lifts costs for equipment buyers and professional GPUs. Export reviews and material controls add another layer of uncertainty.
dek.zh: 先进制程产能受限，推动潜在客户转向其他晶圆代工厂；HBM需求则抬高设备采购与专业GPU的成本。出口审查和关键材料管制又增加了一层不确定性。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Nvidia Raises RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell Price to $13,250
title.zh: Nvidia将RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell价格上调至$13,250

summary.en: Nvidia is now selling the RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell for $13,250, 55% above its original MSRP, while partner cards start at $11,359.99. The increase shows that supply and workstation-AI demand are still supporting unusually high prices a year after launch, raising deployment costs for professional visualization and local AI systems.
summary.zh: Nvidia现将RTX Pro 6000 Blackwell售价定为$13,250，较最初建议零售价高55%，合作伙伴版本起价为$11,359.99。上市一年后仍能大幅提价，说明供应状况与工作站AI需求继续支撑高价，也将推高专业可视化和本地AI系统的部署成本。

title.en: Senao Shows an Intel Xeon 6 SoC DPU on a PCIe Card
title.zh: Senao展示基于Intel Xeon 6 SoC的PCIe DPU卡

summary.en: Senao showed the SX906, a PCIe card built around an Intel Xeon 6 SoC and positioned as a next-generation SmartNIC/DPU. Putting a server-class SoC on an add-in card gives operators another route to offload networking and infrastructure services without redesigning the host platform, though the report does not provide performance or availability details.
summary.zh: Senao展示了SX906，这是一款采用Intel Xeon 6 SoC的PCIe扩展卡，定位为新一代SmartNIC/DPU。把服务器级SoC放到扩展卡上，可让运营商在不重构主机平台的情况下卸载网络与基础设施服务，但报道尚未给出性能或上市时间。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC Capacity Limits Reportedly Push Google Toward Samsung 2nm
title.zh: 据报TSMC产能受限，Google转向接洽Samsung 2nm

summary.en: Google has reportedly approached Samsung about 2nm foundry capacity after TSMC cited limited availability, according to Seoul Economic Daily. If it results in a production order, the move would give Samsung an important advanced-node customer and show how constrained capacity can loosen TSMC's grip on leading-edge designs; no contract has been confirmed.
summary.zh: 据《首尔经济日报》报道，在TSMC表示先进制程产能有限后，Google已就2nm晶圆代工与Samsung接洽。若最终形成量产订单，这将为Samsung带来重要的先进制程客户，也表明产能约束可能削弱TSMC对高端设计的控制力；目前尚无已确认合同。

title.en: TSMC CEO Calls Talent the Company's Biggest AI-Era Constraint
title.zh: TSMC CEO称人才短缺是AI时代最大挑战

summary.en: TSMC's chief executive identified talent shortages as the company's biggest challenge as AI demand drives expansion. The warning shifts attention from fab construction budgets to the engineers and technicians required to ramp and operate new capacity, a constraint that can slow both Taiwan and overseas projects.
summary.zh: TSMC首席执行官表示，在AI需求推动扩张之际，人才短缺是公司面临的最大挑战。这一表态把关注点从厂房投资转向新产能爬坡和运营所需的工程师与技术人员；该瓶颈可能同时拖慢台湾及海外项目。

title.en: Micron Opens Its Sanand Semiconductor Plant in Gujarat
title.zh: Micron在古吉拉特邦启用Sanand半导体工厂

summary.en: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi inaugurated Micron's semiconductor plant in Sanand, Gujarat. The opening gives India's chip-manufacturing policy a tangible operating asset and expands Micron's geographic footprint, although the candidate report does not specify the site's ramp schedule or production capacity.
summary.zh: 印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪为Micron位于古吉拉特邦Sanand的半导体工厂揭幕。该项目为印度的芯片制造政策提供了实体运营资产，也扩大了Micron的地域布局，但候选报道未披露产能爬坡时间或生产规模。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: Intel Reportedly Plans a DDR4 Return With Raptor Lake Next
title.zh: 据报Intel计划以Raptor Lake Next重返DDR4平台

summary.en: Intel is reportedly preparing a Raptor Lake Next platform for LGA 1700 and DDR4 systems in the first half of 2027, although the company declined to comment. Extending an older socket and memory standard would target price-sensitive PCs and preserve demand for DDR4, but the roadmap remains an unconfirmed Computex report.
summary.zh: 据报Intel正准备在2027年上半年推出面向LGA 1700和DDR4系统的Raptor Lake Next，但公司拒绝置评。延长旧插槽和内存标准的生命周期可覆盖价格敏感型PC，并维持DDR4需求，不过这一规划目前仍只是Computex期间未经确认的消息。

title.en: Samsung Reviews Strategy as the Memory Boom Squeezes Devices
title.zh: 存储景气挤压终端业务，Samsung重新评估战略

summary.en: Samsung is reviewing its strategy as stronger memory conditions raise pressure on its device businesses, according to DigiTimes. Higher component prices improve semiconductor profitability but can compress margins in phones and other electronics, forcing Samsung to balance gains as a memory supplier against costs inside its own products.
summary.zh: 据DigiTimes报道，随着存储市场走强对终端设备业务形成压力，Samsung正在重新评估战略。元件涨价有利于半导体部门盈利，却会压缩手机等电子产品的利润率，迫使Samsung在存储供应商收益与自有产品成本之间重新平衡。

title.en: SK Hynix Weighs Supplier Price Increases as HBM Demand Surges
title.zh: HBM需求激增，SK hynix考虑接受供应商涨价

summary.en: SK hynix is weighing price increases from equipment suppliers as the HBM boom lifts tool demand and supplier bargaining power, DigiTimes reports. The shift indicates that AI-memory economics are spreading upstream: higher tool costs can raise the capital intensity of capacity additions even while HBM margins remain strong.
summary.zh: 据DigiTimes报道，随着HBM热潮推高设备需求和供应商议价能力，SK hynix正考虑接受设备供应商涨价。这表明AI存储的经济效应正向上游扩散：即使HBM利润率保持强劲，设备成本上升仍会提高新增产能的资本强度。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: ASML Secures Union Backing for Job Cuts
title.zh: ASML裁员计划获得工会支持

summary.en: ASML has secured union backing for planned job cuts even as its shares approach a record amid the chip-equipment boom. The contrast suggests the lithography leader is tightening selected costs rather than responding to a broad demand collapse, but the candidate report does not disclose the number or location of affected roles.
summary.zh: 在芯片设备景气推动股价接近纪录高位之际，ASML的裁员计划已获得工会支持。这一反差更像是光刻设备龙头在收紧特定成本，而非应对全面需求下滑；不过候选报道未披露受影响岗位数量和地点。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: Taiwan Considers Tighter Controls on AI-Chip Exports to China
title.zh: 台湾考虑收紧对中国大陆的AI芯片出口限制

summary.en: Taiwan is considering tougher restrictions on exports of AI chips to China, a prospect that weighed on TSMC shares. A stricter regime could add licensing and customer-screening risk for chips made in Taiwan, but the proposal's product thresholds and implementation timetable have not yet been specified.
summary.zh: 台湾正考虑收紧对中国大陆的AI芯片出口限制，该消息令TSMC股价承压。更严格的制度可能增加台湾制造芯片的许可与客户审查风险，但提案涉及的产品门槛和实施时间表尚未明确。

title.en: China's Tungsten Export Curbs Test Japan's AI-Chip Supply Chain
title.zh: 中国钨出口限制考验日本AI芯片供应链

summary.en: China's tungsten export restrictions are raising concern about Japan's AI-chip supply chain, according to the South China Morning Post. Tungsten is used across semiconductor manufacturing and electronics, so tighter availability can create cost and qualification pressure upstream even when finished-chip export rules are unchanged.
summary.zh: 据《南华早报》报道，中国的钨出口限制正引发日本AI芯片供应链担忧。钨广泛用于半导体制造和电子产业，因此即使成品芯片出口规则不变，供应收紧也可能在上游造成成本上升和材料认证压力。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 财报与市场

title.en: SK Hynix Reportedly Chooses Nasdaq for a Planned U.S. Listing
title.zh: 据报SK hynix计划赴美在Nasdaq上市

summary.en: SK hynix is reportedly leaning toward Nasdaq for its planned U.S. listing. A U.S. venue could broaden access for global investors and attach a more direct market valuation to the HBM leader, although the report does not specify the instrument, size, or timing of the transaction.
summary.zh: 据报SK hynix倾向于为计划中的美国上市选择Nasdaq。赴美上市可扩大国际投资者的参与渠道，并让市场更直接地为这家HBM龙头定价，但报道未说明上市工具、规模或时间。

theme.en: Adaptive Computation Replaces Fixed Resource Budgets
theme.zh: 自适应计算取代固定资源预算

dek.en: This week's strongest systems papers allocate tokens, parameters, decoding steps, or historical state according to the input rather than a fixed schedule. Device work adds new tools for observing internal fields and using ferroelectric polarization at sensing interfaces.
dek.zh: 本周较有价值的系统论文不再采用固定计划，而是根据输入动态分配token、参数、解码步骤或历史状态。器件研究则带来观测内部电场及利用铁电极化调制传感界面的新方法。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Photoelectric-Coupled Ferroelectric Heterojunctions for Polarization-Memory NO2 Sensing
title.zh: 用于极化记忆NO2传感的光电耦合铁电异质结

papers.authors: L. Tan, X. Hu, M. Zhou, et al.

summary.en: The paper reports a photoelectric-coupled ferroelectric heterojunction that uses polarization memory to modulate the sensing interface for NO2 detection. The architecture links nonvolatile ferroelectric state to gas-response control, potentially reducing the need for continuous bias or external calibration. The candidate record contains no abstract or device metrics, so sensitivity, endurance, selectivity, and manufacturability require review in the full paper.
summary.zh: 论文报道了一种光电耦合铁电异质结，利用极化记忆调制NO2传感界面。该结构把非易失铁电状态与气体响应控制相结合，有望减少持续偏置或外部校准需求。候选记录未提供摘要和器件指标，因此灵敏度、耐久性、选择性与可制造性仍需查阅全文。

title.en: Temporal Glide Symmetry Selects Photonic Frequency Sidebands by Parity
title.zh: 时间滑移对称性按奇偶性选择光子频率边带

summary.en: Camacho derives an exact selection rule for a time-modulated trilayer waveguide: odd frequency sidebands switch transverse parity, while even sidebands preserve it. Floquet eigenstate analysis and finite-section time-domain simulations suppress symmetry-forbidden channels to numerically negligible levels. The result offers a design rule for controlled photonic frequency conversion, but it remains simulation-based and has not yet been demonstrated in fabricated hardware.
summary.zh: Camacho为时间调制三层波导推导出精确选择规则：奇数频率边带会切换横向模态奇偶性，偶数边带则保持奇偶性。Floquet本征态分析和有限区段时域模拟将对称性禁戒通道压低至数值上可忽略的水平。该结果为可控光子频率转换提供了设计规则，但目前仍基于模拟，尚未在制造出的硬件上验证。

title.en: AI Research for Hardware
title.zh: 面向硬件的AI研究

title.en: Dense Supervision Produces Sparse Updates in On-Policy Distillation
title.zh: 密集监督在在策略蒸馏中产生稀疏更新

papers.authors: G. Yu, W. Liu, Y. Hu, et al.

summary.en: Across language and vision-language models, on-policy distillation produces small, coordinate-sparse updates distributed across layers and concentrated in feed-forward networks. Training only the identified subnetwork recovers nearly the same performance as full distillation, suggesting a route to lower optimizer-state and communication costs. The updates remain numerically full-rank and AdamW still beats a sparsity-inducing SGD variant, so the result does not reduce cleanly to low-rank adaptation.
summary.zh: 在语言模型和视觉语言模型上，在策略蒸馏产生幅度较小、坐标稀疏的参数更新，这些更新分布于多层并主要集中在前馈网络。仅训练识别出的子网络即可恢复接近完整蒸馏的性能，为降低优化器状态和通信成本提供了路径。不过更新在数值上仍为满秩，且AdamW优于诱导稀疏的SGD变体，因此该结果不能简单归结为低秩适配。

title.en: Adaptive Token Compression Accelerates Time-Series Language Models
title.zh: 自适应Token压缩加速时间序列语言模型

papers.authors: J. Gan, X. Qiu, G. Chen, et al.

summary.en: The paper compresses time-series tokens according to frequency-domain contribution and progressively drops prompt tokens as their influence fades with depth. Across forecasting, classification, imputation, and anomaly detection, the method reports up to 7.68x inference acceleration and performance gains in 78% of evaluated settings. The systems value is a variable token budget that reduces attention work, although the evidence is limited to time-series tasks rather than general-purpose LLM serving.
summary.zh: 论文根据频域贡献压缩时间序列token，并随着提示词影响在深层网络中减弱而逐层减少prompt token。该方法在预测、分类、插补和异常检测任务上最高实现7.68x推理加速，并在78%的评测设置中提升性能。其系统价值在于以可变token预算减少注意力计算，但证据目前仅来自时间序列任务，尚不能直接推广到通用LLM服务。

title.en: A2D2 Jointly Tunes Insertion and Unmasking for Adaptive Diffusion Decoding
title.zh: A2D2联合优化插入与去掩码以实现自适应扩散解码

papers.authors: S. Tang, Y. Zhu, M. Tao, et al.

summary.en: A2D2 jointly fine-tunes token-insertion and unmasking policies for any-length discrete diffusion models, then uses a quality-based adaptive inference schedule. Its derivation targets the reward-tilted sequence distribution without requiring target samples, and experiments report better reward optimization and generation flexibility than fixed-length baselines. Hardware impact depends on whether adaptive schedules reduce real decoding work after accounting for control overhead; no accelerator measurements are reported.
summary.zh: A2D2面向任意长度离散扩散模型，联合微调token插入和去掩码策略，并采用基于质量的自适应推理调度。其推导无需目标样本即可逼近奖励倾斜的序列分布，实验显示相较固定长度基线可改善奖励优化和生成灵活性。其硬件价值取决于扣除调度控制开销后能否真正减少解码计算，论文未报告加速器实测结果。

title.en: Bitwise Residual Editing for Visual Autoregressive Models
title.zh: 面向视觉自回归模型的逐比特残差编辑

papers.authors: S. Zhang, R. Liao, V. Tresp, et al.

summary.en: BitResEdit performs training-free image editing by steering per-bit Bernoulli predictions inside a KL trust region and reinjecting localized residual codes across scales. Operating on the generator's native bitwise and residual structures preserves masked-out latent features exactly by code arithmetic, rather than relying only on token-level guidance. The approach is specific to bitwise-residual visual autoregressive models such as Infinity, so its utility depends on adoption of that representation.
summary.zh: BitResEdit通过在KL信赖域内引导逐比特Bernoulli预测，并跨尺度重新注入局部残差编码，实现免训练图像编辑。它直接利用生成器原生的逐比特和残差结构，通过编码运算精确保留掩码外的潜在特征，而不是只依赖token级引导。该方法针对Infinity等逐比特残差视觉自回归模型，其价值取决于这类表示方式的采用程度。

title.en: Adaptive Memory Gating for Neural Operators
title.zh: 神经算子的自适应记忆门控

papers.authors: J. Hur, Y. Kwon, M.-G. Jo, et al.

summary.en: AMGFNO learns how much historical state a neural operator should retain instead of applying a fixed memory weight across observation conditions. On Kuramoto-Sivashinsky and Burgers' equation benchmarks, it reports 55-79% lower normalized RMSE at low resolution, while the learned gate falls from about 0.7 toward zero as resolution rises. The adaptive state budget could reduce unnecessary memory traffic, but results are confined to simulated PDE workloads and do not include hardware measurements.
summary.zh: AMGFNO让神经算子学习应保留多少历史状态，而不是在不同观测条件下使用固定记忆权重。在Kuramoto-Sivashinsky和Burgers方程基准上，该方法在低分辨率时将归一化RMSE降低55-79%，并让学习到的门值随分辨率提高从约0.7降至接近0。自适应状态预算可能减少不必要的内存流量，但结果仅限于模拟PDE负载，且没有硬件实测。
